taskInput.placeholder: Add task: taskName(30) or 'do emails for 20 minutes'

scheduleView.title: Today's Schedule
scheduleView.emptyState: No schedule blocks yet. Add tasks and generate a schedule to get started.

timerPanel.emptyState: No active session. Start a task from your schedule to begin tracking time.

errors.parseInvalidFormat: Unable to parse task. Use format: taskName(duration) or 'Do X for Y minutes'
errors.parseInvalidDuration: Duration must be a positive number
errors.storageQuotaExceeded: Storage quota exceeded. Please clear old data.
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load data from storage
errors.scheduleNoTasks: No tasks to schedule. Add some tasks first.

warnings.unscheduledTasks: {count} task(s) couldn't fit in today's schedule

notifications.sessionOverrunMessage: {taskName} has exceeded its allocated time. Keep going or wrap up when ready.

nudges.idle: Still working on {taskName}? Take a moment to check in with yourself.
nudges.overrun: You're doing great! {taskName} is taking a bit longer than planned. That's okay—finish strong or wrap up when you're ready.
nudges.encouragement: Nice work! You're making progress on {taskName}.
